title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c declaration chunk: s_dtn_buf and mutexes
description: Review of static declarations in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:1-20. Findings: 1. s_senml_pack declared and initialized but never used (dead code violation). 2. K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_dtn_mutex) + k_mutex_init() is redundant; native.c uses only DEFINE without runtime init. 3. No separate mutex for s_senml_pack as required. 4. Missing include for senml if not present. All P0-P2 filed as codereview. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Declaration and mutex init fixed per codereview (K_MUTEX_DEFINE used correctly, no redundant init, locks cover all paths in get/post, s_senml_pack used). 3 clean passes achieved with no new findings.
